subcodes.title: Words to Mr Schweizer, spoken on 1913-04-29 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: In you I see such ability that if you should arise to teach the Cause… The Revelation of Baha'u'llah is for action; peruse The Hidden Words and see what He has said therein
subcodes.first_line_orig: من در تو استعدادی می‌بینم که اگر قیام بر تبلیغ امر کنی چنان تأییدی یابی
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
